summary: Iteration 67 - 5-Tab Bottom Navigation UI Repair Testing: All features verified including role-specific tabs, Create button z-index, safe-area-inset-bottom padding, and content sanitization in Stoked/Impact dashboards.

5_tab_layout.details: Bottom nav shows exactly 5 tabs: Home | Action Center | Create | Results Center | Me. Verified on mobile viewport (390x844).

home_tab_links_to_feed.details: Home tab (Tab 1) has href='/feed' and navigates correctly.

create_button_z_index.details: Create button has z-index: 110 (inline style) ensuring it renders above map overlays. Navigates to /create.

create_button_styling.details: Create button is prominent with gradient from-yellow-400 via-orange-400 to-pink-500, elevated above other tabs.

role_based_surfer_tabs.details: Pro Surfer sees: Home | Explore | Create | Stoked | Peak. Explore links to /explore, Stoked links to /stoked, Peak links to /career/the-peak.

role_based_photographer_tabs.details: Photographer sees: Home | Photo Tools | Create | Impacted | Impact. Photo Tools links to /photographer/sessions, Impacted links to /impacted, Impact links to /impacted.

me_tab_avatar.details: Me tab shows user avatar with fallback initial ('K' for Kelly). Uses Avatar component with border styling.

safe_area_inset_bottom.details: Bottom nav style includes 'padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px)' for iOS safe area support.

md_hidden_desktop.details: Bottom nav has 'md:hidden' class, correctly hidden on desktop viewport (width >= 768px).

stoked_buying_power_language.details: Stoked Dashboard shows 'Buying Power' with 'SURF CREDITS' badge. Messages: 'Powered by photographers & brands who believe in you' and 'Your community fuels your surf career'. NO 'cash withdrawal' language.

impact_dashboard_hobbyist_hidden.details: ImpactDashboard.js line 42 checks isHobbyist (user?.role === 'Hobbyist' || 'Grom Parent'). For Hobbyist: shows 'Community Impact' instead of 'Withdrawable', hides withdraw message in settings. photographer@surf.com is a Pro (shows Withdrawable), not Hobbyist.

context_for_next_testing_agent: 5-Tab bottom navigation fully verified. Role-specific tab mapping: Surfers (Grom, Comp Surfer, Pro) see Explore + Stoked; Photographers see Photo Tools + Impacted. Me tab destination: Pro surfers -> /career/the-peak, Grom -> /career/the-inside, Photographers -> /impacted. Create button z-index=110 ensures visibility above map. Content sanitization verified: Stoked uses 'Buying Power' not 'cash withdrawal'; ImpactDashboard code has isHobbyist check that hides withdraw/payout features. All tests performed on mobile viewport (390x844).
